esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-prometheusreceiver.otel-*
// exec_error / (exec_success + exec_error) > 5% indicates SQL layer failures
// Use MAX for counters to get latest cumulative values in window
| WHERE metrics.exec_success IS NOT NULL AND metrics.exec_error IS NOT NULL
| STATS successes = MAX(metrics.exec_success), errors = MAX(metrics.exec_error)
  BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id, attributes.node_id
| EVAL total = successes + errors
| WHERE total > 100
| EVAL error_rate = errors / total
| WHERE error_rate > 0.05
| SORT error_rate DESC
